backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Manish Infratech billing app, defining types (Bill, LineItem, PartyProfile, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations for bills, user profiles, and party GST numbers with access control via a mixin authorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented UI/UX features (header redesign, color theme, typography) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted reference document summarizing the purpose and key implementation details of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Manish Infratech' and mounting the React root at the `#root` div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router configuration with all application routes (Add Bill, Search, Summary, Party Summary, Company Report, Invoice Print) wrapped in an AuthGuard and Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Empty file placeholder for the AccessDeniedScreen component shown to unauthorized principals.
frontend/src/components/AddBillForm.tsx: Bill entry form component with dynamic line items (up to 15), autocomplete for party/product names, automatic GST calculation (18% split into CGST/SGST), and submission to the backend via the useAddBill mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks localStorage session state and renders either a SimpleLoginScreen for unauthenticated users or the wrapped children for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AutocompleteInpu: A controlled input component that displays a filtered dropdown of suggestions based on the current value, closing when clicking outside.
frontend/src/components/BillResultsTable: Renders a styled table of Bill records with edit, delete, and print actions, including confirmation dialogs and loading states.
frontend/src/components/EditBillModal.ts: A modal form for editing an existing bill's party name, date, and line items, with live GST/total calculations and validation before submitting via the editBill mutation.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintView: A print-optimized invoice layout for a Bill, displaying company branding, party details, line items table, GST breakdown, and amount in words.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell with a sticky header containing the Manish Infratech brand, navigation links with active highlighting, and a logout button, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/SimpleLoginScree: A login form that authenticates users via the useSimpleAuth hook, showing username/password fields, error feedback, and a loading state.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of four summary cards displaying Total Revenue, Total GST, CGST, and SGST amounts formatted in INR with icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for bills and related data, exposing queries and mutations for CRUD operations on bills, autocomplete, party GST, and reporting.
frontend/src/hooks/useSimpleAuth.ts: Implements a simple username/password authentication mechanism using localStorage, with hardcoded credentials for Manish Infratech.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Poppins fonts, defining Tailwind CSS layers, CSS custom properties for a white/blue/red theme (light and dark), and print media rules.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddBillPage.tsx: Page component that renders a header with connection status and embeds the AddBillForm component for creating new invoices.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyReportPage.tsx: Page that lets users filter bills by party name and date range to generate a detailed company billing report with CSV download support.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePrintPage.tsx: Page that fetches a single bill by route param and renders it in a printable InvoicePrintView with print and back navigation controls.
frontend/src/pages/PartySummaryPage.tsx: Displays a per-party billing summary with date range filtering and inline GST number editing/saving functionality, showing totals for billed, paid, and pending amounts.
frontend/src/pages/SearchBillsPage.tsx: Provides a search interface to filter all bills by party name or invoice number, displaying results in a BillResultsTable component.
frontend/src/pages/SummaryPage.tsx: Shows a financial summary dashboard with date range filtering, aggregated revenue/GST/payment metrics via SummaryCard components, and a CSV export option for filtered bills.
frontend/src/utils/dateConversion.ts: Utility functions for converting between nanosecond bigint timestamps, milliseconds, date input strings (YYYY-MM-DD), and formatted display strings (DD/MM/YYYY).
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Exports two helpers to format numbers as Indian Rupee currency strings or plain Indian-locale number strings using Intl.NumberFormat.
frontend/src/utils/numberToWords.ts: Converts a numeric amount to Indian currency words (e.g., 12500.50 → 'Rupees Twelve Thousand Five Hundred and Fifty Paise Only') using crore/lakh/thousand denomination breakdown.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), a navy/brand color palette, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, custom shadows, and the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state configuration for Manish Infratech billing/invoice web app, documenting architecture, features, known issues, and build history through version 29. Covers authentication, bill storage, GST calculations, invoice printing, and party/company reporting requirements.
